name: Chocolate Zucchini Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour melted chocolate into egg mixture along with zucchini and vanilla.
2. Sift together flour, salt, cinnamon, baking powder, and baking soda.
3. Stir the sifted ingredients into the zucchini mixture, along with nuts and chips.
4. Mix thoroughly.
5. Spoon the batter into 2 well-greased 9-inch x 5-inch pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
Note: Excellent quickbread. Very moist and sweet. This recipe comes from Country Cook'n, compiled by the St Rose Parishioners of Fredonia, Wis and St Mary's Parishioners of Little Kohler, Wis. The recipe is attributed to Mary Niedermeyer.
